headline: AIG Announces the Sale of Its Remaining Stake in Corebridge Financial, Inc.
summary: NEW YORK, May 05, 2026--American International Group, Inc. (NYSE: AIG) today announced that it has agreed to sell approximately 25 million shares of common stock of Corebridge Financial, Inc. (NYSE: CRBG), representing its remaining stake in the company. The sale, which is expected to close on May 7, will result in net proceeds to AIG of approximately $710 million.

headline: EverQuote's Q1 Earnings & Revenues Beat, Automotive Vertical Grows
summary: EVER beats Q1 estimates on strong insurance segment growth and rising marketing spend, driving revenue and profit gains.
